def positive_abstractions_named_utils_helpers_common_or_manager_hide_true_ownership():
    rule_id = "abstractions_named_utils_helpers_common_or_manager_hide_true_ownership"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag vague abstractions whose names obscure actual ownership and responsibility."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
